chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-320 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 14.10.2025 Petitioner Najeeb Ali in person. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner Najeeb Ali, bearing CNIC No.45203-6322292-3, files statement for not press of instant petition on the ground that his grievance has been redressed. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
